llm_verdict.message: I’ve tried to create a shell script, but the SSH session is still closing. Until the connection to the host is stable, I can’t create or run any files or modify `/etc/cron.daily`. Please verify the host and the tool interface again. Once reliable, I’ll apply the remediation by removing the immutable flag (if set) and running `chmod 0700 /etc/cron.daily`.
